response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and extensive technical experience, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. His last significant C++ work ended in 2015—over 10 years ago—and his career has been almost entirely in web/cloud development (Node.js, TypeScript, React, AWS). The position demands expert-level C++ with STL, multi-threading, and systems programming, plus domain expertise in industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus), and secure development standards (IEC 62443). Bogdan has no industrial automation background, no message-broker experience, and no mention of security compliance practices or industrial protocols. While his software craftsmanship is strong, a 10-year gap in C++ systems programming combined with zero industrial domain exposure represents too high a ramp-up risk for a mid-senior role requiring immediate productivity.
strengths: Proven software craftsmanship: strong TDD practices, testing frameworks, and clean code discipline demonstrated across 19+ years
Solid architectural thinking: event-driven systems design, micro-services infrastructure, and CI/CD automation at scale
Leadership capacity: founded multiple open-source projects, organized training programs, and mentored teams across roles
concerns: C++ skills severely outdated: last significant C++ role ended June 2015; 10+ years without active systems-level programming
Zero industrial automation domain experience: background entirely in web platforms, media, fintech; no IoT, manufacturing, or machinery exposure
Missing critical industrial security and protocols: no mention of SDL, IEC 62443, message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA)

key_factors.factor: Strong fundamentals and proven learning ability
